reasoning: Samsung is at a critical inflection point with Nvidia and Tesla reportedly engaging on HBM and advanced packaging, suggesting Samsung may finally be closing the gap with SK Hynix. The stock sits at 52-week highs but the HBM narrative shift could represent a genuine re-rating opportunity if Samsung captures meaningful share of the AI memory boom. Not enough conviction for full initiation yet—need to see Q1 HBM yields data—but the thesis is developing.
title: Samsung's HBM Moment: Why Nvidia and Tesla Are Calling
angle: Samsung has been the laggard in HBM memory for AI, losing share to SK Hynix. Recent reports of Nvidia/Tesla engagement suggest potential qualification wins that could dramatically shift the competitive narrative. This note frames the bull case around HBM market share inflection and identifies what milestones would trigger a full initiation.
